summary: Build slide decks from source, scratch, or review with structured narrative arcs and design rules.

scripts.purpose: Convert Markdown headings into a structured slide outline with speaker-note placeholders.
Lint slide Markdown for assertion titles, placeholder text, overlong bullets, visual plans, and notes.
Inventory local and remote visual assets referenced by deck Markdown and fail on missing local assets.
Inspect a PPTX file with Python stdlib and emit slide count, media count, and extracted slide text.
Unpack a PPTX archive into an editable XML directory using Python stdlib.
Pack an edited PPTX XML directory back into a .pptx archive using Python stdlib.

signals: audience type and decision needed are explicit
a named narrative arc (A, B, or C) is declared
every headline is a full assertion, not a topic label
open facts are listed, not guessed
QA checklist in SKILL.md is satisfied before done
